notes.note: Failed to Revise: No record found for a publication titled "Correction to: NICP: Neural ICP for 3D Human Registration at Scale". I searched Springer/Link, the ECCV 2024 program, the authors' pages (Marin, Corona, Pons‑Moll), arXiv, MPG PuRe, and other indexes; they show the original paper "NICP: Neural ICP for 3D Human Registration at Scale" (ECCV 2024 / Lecture Notes in Computer Science) but no separate correction/erratum with the provided title. If you meant the original paper (without “Correction to:” ), it is an ECCV 2024 conference paper — tell me if you want the successful classification for that title instead.
